# Suggested GitHub Milestones

## v0.1 Repository Foundation

README, structure, contribution guide, labels, roadmap, and initial docs.

## v0.2 Beginner Learning Path

Cloud fundamentals, ECS, OSS, VPC, RAM, and beginner labs.

## v0.3 Production Infrastructure

Secure VPC, scalable web app, RDS, monitoring, Terraform, and architecture diagrams.

## v0.4 Data And AI Platform

Data lake, batch pipeline, streaming pipeline, PAI, GenAI, and AI governance.

## v1.0 Enterprise-Ready Blueprint

Landing zone, migration, governance, security, cost, certification, interviews, and polished Wiki.
